text: Welcome to the community, @helper_alex! You've been approved as a moderator. We're excited to have you on board to help keep our community friendly and helpful. Check out the #moderation-guide channel for next steps.

Hi @guide_sam, welcome to the community! You've been approved as an event helper. We can't wait to see the great events you'll help organize. Head over to #event-planning to meet the team and get started.

Welcome to the community, @newbie_kim! Your membership application has been approved. We're so happy to have you here. Take a look at #welcome-rules first to get started, and feel free to introduce yourself in #introductions!

Hi @mentor_lina, welcome to the community! You've been approved as a mentor. Thank you so much for offering to share your knowledge with our members. Head over to #mentorship-program to learn how to get started with matching with mentees.
